NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-28-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-28-2004 -DEFENDANT ADRIENNE SIMS FAILED TO APPEAR AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET ON 1/28/04 IN DEPT. 218. COMMISSIONER KAPLAN ORDERED THE JURY DEMAND IN THIS ACTION STRICKEN AND THAT THE MATTER PROCEED TO COURT TRIAL ON 2/2/04 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 206. D. CARTER, CLERK; SUE KAPLAN, COMMISSIONER. NOT REPORTED.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PING, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMS, ADRIENNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1021 SANTIAGO STREET, LOWER UNIT, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $2,906.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,906.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
